summary: Comprehensive testing of Clínica Veterinaria Machado landing page completed successfully. All 13 critical features tested and verified working correctly including WhatsApp CTAs, responsive design, content sections, and proper branding.
passed_tests: Hero section headline displays correct text 'La clínica veterinaria de confianza en San Pablo, Heredia'
Hero WhatsApp CTA links to correct sales URL (wa.me/50689939071)
Hero 'Ver precios' button scrolls smoothly to pricing section
Hero image loads correctly from Unsplash
Services section displays exactly 9 service cards as required
Why Choose Us section displays exactly 4 feature cards as required
Google Maps iframe loads and displays location properly
Contact section displays correct phone numbers (+506 4070-7387, +506 2262-8720)
Contact section displays correct hours (Lun-Vie 7:00-9:45, etc.)
Facebook link points to correct clinic profile URL
Pricing section has correct dark background (#022C22) for high contrast
Pricing section WhatsApp CTA links to sales URL
Footer contains proper Nexo Sites branding and website link
Floating WhatsApp button visible and functional
Backend API health check passed (3/3 endpoints working)
